Using Stochastic %K/ROC cross together with MFI as a volume‑based filter captures true momentum turns while reducing noise in a weekly HBARUSDC market; ATR provides a volatility‑scaled risk‑management framework that adapts to changing market conditions.

Combining StochRSI overbought/oversold extremes with a positive or negative ROC ensures that only strong, sustained momentum moves trigger trades, while ATR‑based sizing limits exposure during low volatility periods, thereby reducing whipsaw losses and drawdown.
